codeReview.summary: The fix commit removes the unreachable `github-auth` instructions branch from `SetupScreen` and updates pending-instructions test coverage so all surviving `_verification_action` values are exercised (`manual`, `openpgp`, `github-ssh`, `github-gpg`, `gist`). Reviewing both diffs confirms the original failure condition in `b906b60` (handler existed with no setter) is eliminated in `721c8fd`.

summary: Reviewed the fix transcript skeleton, prior failed review, and both commit diffs (`b906b60` and `721c8fd`). The dead `github-auth` pending-instructions branch identified as blocking in the original review is now removed, no contract/test references remain, and surviving verification-action paths are covered by pilot tests. Marking this fix feature as pass.
